title: dactylorhiza elata subsp. elongata
intro: Dactylorhiza elata subsp. elongata, also known as the Elongated Spurred Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid found in the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza elata subsp. elongata include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
